name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Transaction Fee
description: You are given an array prices where prices[i] is the price of a stock on the ith day, and an integer fee representing a transaction fee. You may complete as many transactions as you like, but you must pay the fee for each transaction. Return the maximum profit.
